title: Better Cherry Leaves
description: Changes the lime in the cherry leaves texture to the purple of the log!
body:
# Better Cherry Leaves
Disgusted by the lime coloration of cherry leaves? Hate how they don't work well in many themes you wish them to? Furious about how the lime doesn't have a foliage tint despite pink petals having a grass tint?

**We'll have I got the solution for you!**
### **Introducing: *25 pixels of purple!***

That's about all I got.
***Enjoy!***
